name: Bow Tie Limousine Svc

fit_notes: South Carolina school bus transport is dominated by the state-run SCDE bus fleet - private school-bus contracting is limited. This Mt. Pleasant residential-address limo operator is almost certainly not a yellow-bus contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.
